meaning: n.[蝨｣扈従 豌第焚隶ｰ(譌ｧ郤ｦ蝨｣扈冗噪隨ｬ蝗帛差)
examples: The numbers add up to exactly 100.
All the phone numbers had been erased.
Scottish Retail Consortium (SRC) footfall figures show numbers increased by 1% compared to a year ago.
Overall police numbers hit a nine-year low in 2012, due to tighter budget constraints slowing recruitment.
